metadata.reference: L. Yu. Beliaev, E. Shkondin, A. V. Lavrinenko, O. Takayama. Optical properties of plasmonic titanium nitride thin films from ultraviolet to mid-infrared wavelengths deposited by pulsed-DC sputtering, thermal and plasma-enhanced atomic layer deposition. Opt. Mater. 143, 114237 (2023) (Numerical data kindly provided by Osamu Takayama)
metadata.comments: 50 nm thick film deposited by pulsed-DC sputtering.
